question: Create a `MyString` class that manages a dynamic character array. Implement both a copy constructor and an assignment operator (`operator=`). Explain when each of these is invoked through code examples.

test_cases.expected:
--- Demonstrating MyString Class ---
s1 initialized: "Initial String" (length 14)

--- Explaining Copy Constructor Invocation ---
  1. Initialization of a new object from an existing one:
  [MyString] Copy constructor invoked for "Initial String"
s2 initialized from s1: "Initial String" (length 14)
  s3 initialized: "Another String" (length 14)
  [MyString] Copy constructor invoked for "Another String"
s4 initialized from s3: "Another String" (length 14)

  2. Passing an object by value to a function:
  Calling func_by_value with s1...
  [MyString] Copy constructor invoked for "Initial String"
  Inside func_by_value: Parameter s: "Initial String" (length 14)
  Leaving func_by_value.
  [MyString] Destructor invoked for "Initial String"
  Back in main after func_by_value.
s1 (after func_by_value): "Initial String" (length 14)

--- Explaining Assignment Operator Invocation ---
  Assignment occurs when an already constructed object is assigned a new value.

s5 initialized: "Original Content" (length 16)
s6 initialized: "New Content" (length 11)
  Invoking assignment operator: s5 = s6;
  [MyString] Copy constructor invoked for "New Content"
  [MyString] Assignment operator invoked (copy-and-swap) from "New Content" to "Original Content"
  [MyString] Destructor invoked for "Original Content"
s5 assigned from s6: "New Content" (length 11)
s6 (after assignment): "New Content" (length 11)

--- Demonstrating Self-Assignment (Correctly Handled) ---
s7 initialized: "Self-Assignment Test" (length 20)
  Invoking self-assignment: s7 = s7;
  [MyString] Copy constructor invoked for "Self-Assignment Test"
  [MyString] Assignment operator invoked (copy-and-swap) from "Self-Assignment Test" to "Self-Assignment Test"
  [MyString] Destructor invoked for "Self-Assignment Test"
s7 (after self-assignment): "Self-Assignment Test" (length 20)

--- End of demonstration ---
  [MyString] Destructor invoked for "Self-Assignment Test"
  [MyString] Destructor invoked for "New Content"
  [MyString] Destructor invoked for "Original Content"
  [MyString] Destructor invoked for "Another String"
  [MyString] Destructor invoked for "Another String"
  [MyString] Destructor invoked for "Initial String"
  [MyString] Destructor invoked for "Initial String"
